## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.2

### 🔔 Camera AI Notifications
- Subscribes to the Android app AI-plan MQTT topic using the decoded X-Sense `user_id_code` token claim.
- Maps APK `dispatchDevs` camera identifiers into the integration's normal station and device lookup path.
- Creates AI Detection event entities for supported station cameras, child-device cameras, and standalone device-style cameras.

### 🔧 Integration Reliability
- Handles malformed restored tokens without failing the session restore path.
- Keeps the 1.3.x native camera live view path unchanged.

### 📚 Documentation
- Cleans up the root README Chinese language links so HACS renders them correctly.
